entities.context: Genetic variant V carries one copy of (AG genotype)

entities.name: A1298C (rs1801131)
entities.context: Genetic variant V does not carry (TT genotype)

entities.name: Methylfolate
entities.context: Active form of folate supplement, recommended for V

entities.name: Folic acid
entities.context: Synthetic folate supplement, less optimal for V

entities.name: B-complex vitamins
entities.context: Vitamin supplements, recommended with active forms for V
